title: Electric Boogaloo: The Wild, Untold Story of Cannon Films
original_title: Electric Boogaloo: The Wild, Untold Story of Cannon Films
overview: A documentary about the rise and fall of the Cannon Film Group, the legendary independent film company helmed by Israeli cousins Menahem Golan and Yoram Globus.
